title: Move chevron next to category tag in expanded chatroom header

requirements.text: In the chatroom header (ChatArea.tsx), move the chevron icon so it appears directly next to the category tag when the header is in its expanded (non-collapsed) state. Do not change any styles, colors, sizing, or any other part of the component.

quotes: move the chevron next to the category tag in the chatroom header because it's not there yet when it's not collapsed
Don't make any other changes. Don't change any styles either

acceptanceCriteria: The chevron icon is rendered adjacent to the category tag in the chatroom header when the panel is expanded (not collapsed).
No visual style changes (colors, font sizes, spacing, layout) are introduced anywhere in the component.
The chevron continues to function correctly (toggling collapse/expand) after being repositioned.
The collapsed state of the header remains unchanged.

constraints: Do not change any CSS classes, Tailwind styles, or inline styles.
Do not modify any component other than the chatroom header section in ChatArea.tsx.
Only move the chevron element's position in the JSX — no other changes.
nonGoals: Changing the collapsed state behavior or appearance.
Modifying any other header elements (viewer count, topic text, etc.).
